---
title: "Annie Lush"
---

## Annie Lush

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1881, 2) as Te Aroha, She was daughter of the Rev. Vicesimus Lush, Archdeacon of Waikato, of Auckland New Zealand.

### Biography

Her married name was Ruddock.  The slip accompanying payment of £2 17<i>s.</i> 6<i>d.</i> for her article \'A Trip to Norfolk Island\' <i>MP</i> (May 1881) is held by the Ewelme Cottage Museum

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
